title: Conqueror-class atmospheric dreadnaught

{{Quote|Oh, excellent…|Obi-Wan Kenobi, upon seeing a ''Conqueror''-class atmospheric dreadnaught|<ref name="S" />}}
The '''''Conqueror''-class atmospheric dreadnaught''' was a huge, circular [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] aerial attack platform utilized by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Heavily armed with dozens of [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and crewed by many [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], several ''Conqueror''-class [[Dreadnaught/Legends|dreadnaughts]] were used by the Confederacy when it [[Battle of Terra Sool|invaded]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Terra Sool]].

At least thirty-six dreadnaughts were deployed in Terra Sool's cloudy [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], fighting against the [[Terra Sool militia|local militia]] and a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|detachment]] sent to aid Terra Sool. Although the ''Conqueror''-class dreadnaughts easily destroyed many of Terra Sool's [[Terra Sool militia fighter|militia fighters]], the platforms were no match for [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], who led the Republic task force. Using their [[Force power/Legends|powers]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and their mastery of [[Starfighter combat/Legends|starfighter combat]], Kenobi and Skywalker hijacked and destroyed several ''Conqueror''-class dreadnaughts during the battle, eventually defeating the Confederates and freeing Terra Sool.

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|I'm on my way. If I can figure out how to pilot this thing…|Obi-Wan Kenobi, after commandeering a ''Conqueror''-class dreadnaught|<ref name="S" />}}
[[File:Pilot_battle_droid.jpg|thumb|left|250px|A pair of OOM pilot battle droids at the helm of a ''Conqueror''-class atmospheric dreadnaught.]]
The ''Conqueror''-class [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] [[Dreadnaught/Legends|dreadnaught]] was an extremely [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|expensive]] and large<ref name="TCSWE" /> [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] aerial attack platform used in the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]' [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Nearly impenetrable [[Battleship/Legends|battleships]],<ref name="TCC" /> the dreadnaughts were roughly cylindrical in shape, sporting a flat top that served as both a landing pad and a [[Troop/Legends|troop]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] area. The Conqueror dreadnaughts had a series of halls and rooms in their interior, including a [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] on the perimeter of the vessel that housed a large control board that operated the entire aerial platform.<ref name="S" />

The Conqueror platforms were heavily armed, equipped with dozens of [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] batteries<ref name="TCSWE" />—including five single-barrel cannons on the dreadnaughts' top side, as well as a number of dual-barrel [[Laser/Legends|laser]] batteries that lined the dreadnaughts' upper ringed perimeter. During their service in the Confederacy's [[Army/Legends|army]], the dreadnaughts carried a complement of at least twenty-four [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]] and [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]], and were [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by a pair of [[OOM pilot battle droid/Legends|OOM pilot battle droids]]; however, the platforms could also be piloted by single [[Human/Legends|Human]].<ref name="S" />

==History==
{{Quote|Master, we have a slight problem.|Anakin Skywalker, upon seeing a whole fleet of ''Conqueror''-class dreadnaughts during the battle of Terra Sool|<ref name="S" />}}
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]—five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] and the outbreak of the Clone Wars—the Confederacy [[Battle of Terra Sool|invaded]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Terra Sool]].<ref name="S" /> The Confederacy dispatched a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]<ref name="TCSWE" /> of at least thirty-six ''Conqueror''-class atmospheric dreadnaughts to crush the planet's opposition<ref name="S" /> and raze Terra Sool's surface.<ref name="TCSWE" /> When the Conqueror dreadnaught fleet entered Terra Sool's cloudy atmosphere—along with a number of Confederate [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droid starfighters]]—it was engaged by [[Terra Sool militia fighter|starfighters]] of Terra Sool's [[Terra Sool militia|local militia]] and a detachment of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] that had been sent to Terra Sool to assist in the planet's defense.<ref name="S" />

The Conqueror platforms easily dispatched dozens of the militia [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], but the dreadnaughts were outmatched by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], who were in command of the Republic task force aboard their [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 starfighters]]. During the battle, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] first encountered a single ''Conqueror''-class dreadnaught while fighting off Vulture starfighters over Terra Sool, and Kenobi—deciding to commandeer the Confederate ship—landed his starfighter on the dreadnaught's roof, fending off the B1 and B2 [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] stationed there. Making his way inside the Conqueror platform, Kenobi managed to fight his way to the cockpit and take control of the dreadnaught.<ref name="S" />

[[File:CIS_Battle_Platform.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A fleet of ''Conqueror''-class dreadnaughts over Terra Sool]]
In the meantime, Skywalker's [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], informed the Padawan—who was still fighting off [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]]—that it was picking up more [[Droid/Legends|droid]] communications coming from farther away in the atmosphere. Following the Confederate communications to their source, Skywalker found the rest of the Conqueror dreadnaught fleet fighting the Terra Sool militia over a small [[Farm/Legends|farming]] [[Unidentified town (Terra Sool)|town]]. Skywalker joined the battle, but his fighter was damaged during the engagement, forcing him to crash-land on a dreadnaught's top side. Stranded on the enemy craft, Skywalker fought the battle droids aboard that battleship while Kenobi piloted his captured Conqueror dreadnaught toward the main [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate fleet]]. Using the weapons aboard his hijacked vessel, Kenobi destroyed another dreadnaught that was aiming at the one Skywalker was aboard, while the Padawan cleared the remaining battle droids from that aerial platform.<ref name="S" />

Kenobi began to engage the other Confederate dreadnaughts and contacted Skywalker, informing his apprentice that the Confederate fleet had launched two waves of [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] to raze Terra Sool's surface. Seeing the oncoming missiles, Skywalker used his [[Force power/Legends|mastery]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] skills to dispatch the missiles, including [[Telekinesis/Legends|grabbing]] another Conqueror dreadnaught with the Force and moving the vessel in the way of a wave of missiles, destroying both the Conqueror dreadnaught and the missiles simultaneously. Skywalker and Kenobi continued to fight against the Confederacy and eventually defeated the fleet of ''Conqueror''-class dreadnaughts by the end of the Terra Sool day, freeing the planet from the invasion.<ref name="S" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Conqueror''-class atmospheric dreadnaughts first appeared as unnamed Separatists war machines in ''[[Skywalkers]]'', a forty-page [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 2]]'', published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] and released [[September 7]], [[2004]]. The Conqueror dreadnaught was later given an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''—released [[December 9]], [[2008]]—which identified the vessel's class name.
